home.subtitle: Three pillars for sustainable market success

homeStrategy.title: The Strategic Approach
homeStrategy.quote: I turn the process around. For me, success doesn't start with design, but with profitability.
homeStrategy.author: Tim Plasse
homeStrategy.description: F&B Heroes focuses on the economic basis to ensure long-term stability in volatile markets.

features.title: Process Automation
features.desc: Relieving staff of repetitive tasks for more focus on the guest.

features.title: Constant Quality
features.desc: Precise results with every preparation, regardless of personnel capacity.

features.title: Scalable Margins
features.desc: Significant reduction in operating costs through intelligent technology integration.

integration.title: Strategic Integration
integration.description: Seamless integration into existing teams to accelerate innovation processes.

collaboration.title: Models of Cooperation
collaboration.description: Flexibility is the core feature of our partnerships. The models are based on the individual needs of our clients.

retainer.title: Retainer Agreement
retainer.description: Long-term support through a defined monthly hourly quota. This model is suitable for continuous optimization and strategic consulting over several quarters.

projectBased.title: Project-based
projectBased.description: Targeted support for specific milestones such as new openings, new developments, or the technical implementation of robotics in gastronomy.

targetGroupsSection.title: Target Groups & Perspectives
targetGroupsSection.description: Consideration of the specific requirements of different market participants.

traditional.label: Traditional F&B Consulting
items: Purely theoretical concepts lacking implementation focus
Slow speed of adaptation in feedback loops

ctaSection.title: Optimization of F&B Strategy
ctaSection.description: In a 30-minute initial consultation, potentials and objectives for a collaboration will be discussed.
